tagline: One family. Many focused Sathi apps.

apps.name: Pariksha Sathi
apps.tagline: Plan your preparation, day by day.
apps.description: Study planner for competitive exams with exam registry, syllabus-aware planning, PDF export, checklist, streaks, and cloud sync.

apps.name: Rozgar Sathi
apps.description: Sarkari jobs portal with vacancy listing, resume builder, application tracker, shared Google login, and PWA install support.

apps.name: Samachar Sathi
apps.description: Current affairs and daily analysis app with local vault storage, archive flow, admin import, shared auth hooks, and PWA support.

apps.name: Hisaab Sathi
apps.tagline: Daily finance and udhar ledger in one place.
apps.description: Expense, income, udhar given, udhar returned, Gmail backup fallback, reminder support, and mobile-first ledger flow.

apps.name: Antariksh Sathi
apps.tagline: Sky events, ISRO watch, and stargazing in one orbit.
apps.description: Offline-first space companion with meteor showers, eclipse markers, ISRO mission watch, India stargazing spots by state, agency directory, and a student curiosity lab.

apps.name: Ganit Sathi
apps.tagline: Calculator, converters, and age utility in one premium studio.
apps.description: TypeScript-first utility app with normal and scientific calculator, daily currency sync, multi-category unit conversion, age calculator, shared family login, and cloud-ready preferences.

apps.name: Jal Sathi
apps.tagline: Hydration reminders and water rhythm in one calm dashboard.
apps.description: Hydration companion with official baseline goal references, wake-to-sleep reminder plan, quick logging, streak tracking, and shared family sync hooks.

apps.name: Mann Sathi
apps.tagline: Journal diary, mood tracking, and warm daily messages.
apps.description: Local-first journal app with mood scoring, non-repeating morning and night message stock, supportive diary flow, and shared family sync hooks.

apps.name: Sanket Sathi
apps.tagline: Hindi-English Morse translator with fast local conversion.
apps.description: Offline-first Morse translator for text-to-code and code-to-text conversion, with lightweight Hindi transliteration support and family-ready PWA hooks.

apps.name: Sikka Sathi
apps.tagline: Coin flip, dice roll, and quick chance calls in one bold board.
apps.description: Chance utility app with animated coin toss, dice roller, streak tracking, and a clean offline-first family interface.

apps.name: Khel Sathi
apps.tagline: Family tic tac toe with friend and bot modes.
apps.description: Playful mobile-first tic tac toe app with two-player mode, lightweight bot mode, and persistent round scoreboard.

apps.name: Dhyan Sathi
apps.tagline: Study watch and focus timer with calm deep-work rhythm.
apps.description: Focus companion with 25/45/60 minute presets, break switching, task anchoring, cycle tracking, and browser notification support.

apps.name: Mausam Sathi
apps.tagline: Current weather and five-day outlook in a clean sky board.
apps.description: Open-Meteo powered weather app with city search, current conditions, five-day forecast, and optional geolocation.

apps.name: Paltu Sathi
apps.tagline: Cute virtual pet care with mood meters and playful actions.
apps.description: Local-first virtual pet app with feed, play, rest, clean actions, pet naming, and live mood changes.

apps.name: Panchang Sathi
apps.tagline: Daily Hindu calendar, timings, and festival context at a glance.
apps.description: Panchang companion with tithi, nakshatra, yoga, paksha, masa, sunrise timings, preset cities, and geolocation support.

apps.name: Ank Sathi
apps.tagline: Numerology number mapping with quick personal meaning cards.
apps.description: Reflective numerology tool with life path, birth day, attitude, and name number calculations in a polished mobile-first studio.
